summary: Iteration 44 - EchoStratus Predictive Intelligence Dashboard Test PASSED. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend EchoStratus panel fully functional with all 7 views working: Executive, Forecast, Scenarios, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk. Real data from MongoDB displayed correctly. AI Executive Summary narrative generated successfully.

issues: Horizon buttons (7d, 30d, 90d, 12m, 36m) don't have data-testid attributes matching expected pattern 'horizon-{id}' - they use different labels like '7-Day', '30-Day' etc.

critical_code_review_comments: EchoStratus frontend (641 lines) is well-structured with clear component separation
All 7 views have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API calls use window.location.origin for proper URL handling
IBM Plex fonts and Bloomberg Terminal dark aesthetic implemented correctly
Real data from MongoDB displayed with proper formatting (currency, percentages)
AI Executive Summary uses Emergent LLM with deterministic fallback
Confidence badge shows forecast confidence and data sources count
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tests use existing MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified the EchoStratus Predictive Intelligence Dashboard. All 7 API endpoints tested: GET /api/echo-stratus/executive/dashboard, POST /api/echo-stratus/executive/narrative, GET /api/echo-stratus/forecast/domains, POST /api/echo-stratus/forecast, GET /api/echo-stratus/scenarios/templates, POST /api/echo-stratus/scenarios/simulate, GET /api/echo-stratus/signals, GET /api/echo-stratus/recommendations, GET /api/echo-stratus/portfolio/overview, GET /api/echo-stratus/portfolio/risk-radar. Frontend panel accessible via sidebar 'EchoStratus' button (located at y>600 in sidebar). Panel key is 'stratus' in panel-registry.ts.

backend_api_tests.executive_dashboard: PASS - returns KPIs (revenue, ebitda, margin, food_cost_pct, labor_pct, pipeline_value), cost_structure, projections, confidence
backend_api_tests.executive_narrative: PASS - generates AI executive summary with 3 paragraphs (performance, risks, actions)
backend_api_tests.forecast_30d: PASS - returns 30 daily periods with revenue, cost, profit, confidence bands
backend_api_tests.scenario_templates: PASS - returns 5 templates (occupancy_drop, price_increase, event_cancellation, labor_cap, commissary_expansion)
backend_api_tests.scenario_simulate_occupancy: PASS - simulates 12% occupancy drop with EBITDA impact
backend_api_tests.recommendations: PASS - returns 2 recommendations with estimated impact
backend_api_tests.portfolio_overview: PASS - returns 6 outlets with performance metrics
backend_api_tests.risk_radar: PASS - returns overall score 32 (low) with 6 risk dimensions

frontend_ui_tests.panel_loads: PASS - EchoStratus panel opens from sidebar
frontend_ui_tests.executive_view: PASS - KPI cards, 30-Day Projection, Cost Structure, AI Executive Summary, Confidence badge all render
frontend_ui_tests.forecast_view: PASS - Horizon buttons, KPI cards, bar chart render correctly
frontend_ui_tests.scenarios_view: PASS - 5 scenario templates display, simulation runs and shows EBITDA impact
frontend_ui_tests.signals_view: PASS - Shows 'All Clear' state when no anomalies
frontend_ui_tests.recommendations_view: PASS - Shows recommendation cards with impact and ROI
frontend_ui_tests.portfolio_view: PASS - Shows portfolio KPIs and outlet ranking table
frontend_ui_tests.risk_view: PASS - Shows risk dimensions with severity bars and overall score
frontend_ui_tests.navigation: PASS - All 7 nav tabs work correctly

mocked_apis.note: All APIs return real data from MongoDB. AI narrative uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback.

executive_dashboard.ai_executive_summary: 3-paragraph narrative with performance snapshot, risks/opportunities, recommended actions

forecast_engine.chart: Bar chart with confidence band visualization

signals.all_clear_state: Shows 'All Clear' message when no anomalies detected

portfolio.outlet_ranking: Table with name, type, revenue, margin, utilization
